changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.m_code_value (code_id, code_value, is_active, is_mandatory) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Accommodation and Food Services', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Administrative and Support and Waste Management and Remediation Services', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing and Hunting', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Arts, Entertainment, and Recreation', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Construction', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Educational Services', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Electricity, Gas, Steam, and Air Conditioning Supply', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Finance and Insurance', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Health Care and Social Assistance', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Information', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Management of Companies and Enterprises', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Manufacturing', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Other Services (except Public Administration)', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Public Administration', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Real Estate and Rental and Leasing', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Research and Development', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Retail Trade', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Transportation and Warehousing', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Utilities', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Main Business Line' LIMIT 1), 'Wholesale Trade', true, false ) ON CONFLICT (code_value, code_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.m_code_value (code_id, code_value, is_active, is_mandatory) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Branch Office of Foreign Companies', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Free Zone Companies', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Free Zone Establishments', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Government Owned', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Limited Liability Companies', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Partnership', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Public Joint Stock Company', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Sole Proprietorship', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Constitution' LIMIT 1), 'Others', true, false ) ON CONFLICT (code_value, code_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.m_code_value (code_id, code_value, is_active, is_mandatory) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Types' LIMIT 1), 'Reducing Rate', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Types' LIMIT 1), 'Flat Rate', true, false ) ON CONFLICT (code_value, code_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.m_code_value (code_id, code_value, is_active, is_mandatory) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Frequencies' LIMIT 1), 'Daily', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Frequencies' LIMIT 1), 'Weekly', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Frequencies' LIMIT 1), 'Fortnightly', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Frequencies' LIMIT 1), 'Monthly', true, false ), ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Interest Frequencies' LIMIT 1), 'Yearly', true, false ) ON CONFLICT (code_value, code_id) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: fineract
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.m_code_value (code_id, code_value, is_active, is_mandatory) VALUES ( (SELECT id FROM public.m_code WHERE code_name = 'Product Names' LIMIT 1), 'Revenue Based Financing', true, false ) ON CONFLICT (code_value, code_id) DO NOTHING;
